width="1200" x="-110" y="1500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Dy8BECElt-nPjucO-jGI-252" parent="1" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="<h3 data-section-id="lqnedj" data-start="122" data-end="132">Legend</h3>
<p data-start="134" data-end="245">🟢 <strong data-start="137" data-end="168">Business &amp; Application Flow</strong><br data-start="168" data-end="171">
Core fulfilment transactions, application processing and robot operations.</p>
<p data-start="247" data-end="346">🔵 <strong data-start="250" data-end="275">Data &amp; Messaging Flow</strong><br data-start="275" data-end="278">
Database transactions, messaging, replication and backup activities.</p>
<p data-start="348" data-end="451">🟡 <strong data-start="351" data-end="383">Monitoring &amp; Operations Flow</strong><br data-start="383" data-end="386">
Observability, alerting, log analysis and operational automation.</p>
<p data-start="453" data-end="571">🟣 <strong data-start="456" data-end="486">AI Operations Intelligence</strong><br data-start="486" data-end="489">
Knowledge management, retrieval, AI-assisted troubleshooting and support guidance.</p>
<p data-start="573" data-end="687">🔴 <strong data-start="576" data-end="601">Security &amp; Governance</strong><br data-start="601" data-end="604">
Cross-cutting security, compliance, auditing and configuration management controls.</p>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="480" width="490" x="1430" y="1430" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.p:
🟢 Business & Application Flow
Core fulfilment transactions, application processing and robot operations.

🔵 Data & Messaging Flow
Database transactions, messaging, replication and backup activities.

🟡 Monitoring & Operations Flow
Observability, alerting, log analysis and operational automation.

🟣 AI Operations Intelligence
Knowledge management, retrieval, AI-assisted troubleshooting and support guidance.

🔴 Security & Governance
Cross-cutting security, compliance, auditing and configuration management controls.
